info.name: Microsoft Azure ApplicationInsightsManagementClient
info.description: Azure Application Insights client for Components

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Insights Components

request.description: Gets a list of all Application Insights components within a subscription.

response.name: A list containing 0 or more Application Insights component definitions.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Insights Components Resourcename Purge

variable.description: (Required) The name of the Application Insights component resource.

request.description:
Purges data in an Application Insights component by a set of user-defined filters.

In order to manage system resources, purge requests are throttled at 50 requests per hour. You should batch the execution of purge requests by sending a single command whose predicate includes all user identities that require purging. Use the in operator to specify multiple identities. You should run the query prior to using for a purge request to verify that the results are expected.

response.name: Accepted request for purging an Application Insights component.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Insights Components Resourcename Operations Purgeid

variable.description: (Required) The name of the Application Insights component resource.
(Required) In a purge status request, this is the Id of the operation the status of which is returned.

request.description: Get status for an ongoing purge operation.

response.name: Returns status of purge operation in body of response. e.g.:  running, completed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Put Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Insights Components Resourcename

variable.description: (Required) The name of the Application Insights component resource.

request.description: Creates (or updates) an Application Insights component. Note: You cannot specify a different value for InstrumentationKey nor AppId in the Put operation.

response.name: Successful request when creating or updating an Application Insights component. The updated component is returned.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Patch Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Insights Components Resourcename

variable.description: (Required) The name of the Application Insights component resource.

request.description: Updates an existing component's tags. To update other fields use the CreateOrUpdate method.

response.name: Updating the Application Insights component's tags was successful. Component tags are updated and returned with the rest of the Component's object properties.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
